arts.ttl: Nico Paz: “Carlo Ancelotti knows how to get the most out of his players”
arts.sum: Nico Paz spoke very highly of Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti in a recent interview, saying he knows how to get the best out of his players. Paz was asked about his time at Real Madrid and working under Carlo Ancelotti, about whom he only said good things: “Ancelotti was happy for me after the goal against Napoli, he knew what it meant to me.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting XI against Atlético Madrid in LaLiga
arts.sum: Ancelotti’s probable starting eleven for the derby includes: Courtois; Carvajal, Militao, Rüdiger, Mendy; Valverde, Tchouaméni, Modric, Bellingham; Rodrygo, and Vinícius . Mbappé's injury likely means Madrid will deploy four midfielders, with Vinicius and Rodrygo leading the attack.

arts.ttl: Former Real Madrid starlet confirms Blancos return hopes

arts.ttl: Team News: Atletico Madrid vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Atletico Madrid and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala ‘open to everything’ amid Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been handed a major transfer boost on Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala for 2025. Manchester City are also interested in the Germany international with the super clubs reportedly ready for a €100m battle. Musiala is on both teams agenda with his current deal in Bavaria expiring in June 2026 and he is […] The post Jamal Musiala ‘open to everything’ amid Real Madrid transfer links appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'bidding to sign' Man United star during next summer's transfer window
arts.sum: Real Madrid will allegedly move for Manchester United's Diogo Dalot next summer if Trent Alexander-Arnold signs a new deal at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: When is Atlético Madrid - Real Madrid? How to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Atlético Madrid - Real Madrid will be played on Sunday 29 September with kick off at 3 p.m. ET / 12 p.m. PT. Follow Atlético Madrid - Real Madrid live with AS USA

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend backs Endrick to shine in Kylian Mbappe's absence
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid striker Fernando Morientes believes Endrick has what it takes to step up in place of Kylian Mbappe while the French star is sidelined with a leg injury. Morientes also explained the impact of Mbappe's injury, detailing how it may affect the squad.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: ‘No doubt’ Real Madrid star deserves Ballon d’Or
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday thrown his backing behind a leading member of his attacking ranks, to secure the next Ballon d’Or. The player in question?…
